en: Students seeking elite engineering and technology education
Applicants targeting top global research opportunities
Highly competitive and academically ambitious students
Future leaders in AI, engineering, policy, and innovation
Students comfortable with intense academic pressure
zh: 希望接受顶尖工程与科技教育的学生
目标进入全球顶级科研体系的申请者
学术竞争力极强且目标明确的学生
未来希望进入 AI、工程、政策或创新领域的学生
能够适应高强度学术压力的学生

en: Students seeking a broad and prestigious academic environment
Applicants interested in humanities, social sciences, and policy
Students valuing intellectual culture and interdisciplinary study
Future researchers, scholars, and public-sector leaders
Students wanting strong overall academic flexibility
zh: 希望进入顶尖综合学术环境的学生
对人文、社科与政策研究感兴趣的申请者
重视思想氛围与跨学科学习的学生
未来希望从事科研、学术或公共事务的学生
希望拥有广泛学术选择空间的学生

en: Students seeking a balance between academics and international exposure
Applicants interested in studying in Shanghai
Students valuing urban lifestyle and global connectivity
Future professionals in business, media, finance, and international fields
Students wanting a more internationalized campus atmosphere
zh: 希望平衡学术与国际化体验的学生
希望在上海学习生活的申请者
重视国际城市资源与现代生活方式的学生
未来计划进入金融、商业、媒体或国际领域的学生
希望体验更国际化校园环境的学生

en: Students focused on engineering, technology, and applied research
Applicants seeking strong industry connections
Students interested in innovation and large-scale research projects
Future engineers and technical professionals
Students wanting strong career-oriented technical education
zh: 专注于工科、科技与应用研究的学生
希望获得强产业资源连接的申请者
对大型科研项目与技术创新感兴趣的学生
未来计划成为工程师或技术人才的学生
希望获得就业导向型技术教育的学生

en: Students interested in entrepreneurship and innovation
Applicants drawn to China’s private tech ecosystem
Students combining engineering with startup ambitions
Future founders, product builders, and tech innovators
Students seeking a fast-moving and ambitious environment
zh: 对创业与创新感兴趣的学生
希望接触中国民营科技产业生态的申请者
希望结合工科与创业发展的学生
未来希望成为创业者或科技创新者的学生
喜欢快速发展和高活力环境的学生

en: Students valuing academic depth and traditional scholarship
Applicants interested in fundamental sciences and research
Students preferring a quieter and more research-focused culture
Future academics and theoretical researchers
Students less interested in aggressive commercialization
zh: 重视学术深度与传统学术氛围的学生
对基础科学与研究感兴趣的申请者
偏好安静科研环境的学生
未来计划从事理论研究或学术工作的学生
不喜欢过度商业化校园氛围的学生

universities.name_en: University of Science and Technology of China

en: Highly academic students focused on science and research
Applicants seeking elite scientific training
Students interested in physics, mathematics, AI, and advanced sciences
Future PhD candidates and researchers
Students comfortable with intensive academic rigor
zh: 高度偏学术与科研导向的学生
希望接受精英科学训练的申请者
对物理、数学、AI 与前沿科学感兴趣的学生
未来计划攻读博士或从事科研的学生
能够适应高强度学术训练的学生

en: Students seeking serious engineering training
Applicants interested in aerospace, robotics, and advanced manufacturing
Students valuing technical depth over campus glamour
Applicants looking for strong value outside first-tier cities
Students comfortable with colder northern-city environments
zh: 希望接受扎实硬核工科训练的学生
对航空航天、机器人与先进制造感兴趣的申请者
更重视技术实力而非校园光鲜感的学生
希望获得高性价比顶尖工科教育的学生
能够适应北方寒冷城市环境的学生

en: Students seeking strong traditional engineering education
Applicants interested in research and national strategic industries
Students valuing academic stability and technical foundations
Future engineers in energy, manufacturing, and infrastructure
Students interested in western China’s academic environment
zh: 希望获得传统强工科教育的学生
对科研与国家战略产业感兴趣的申请者
重视学术稳定性与技术基础的学生
未来计划进入能源、制造或基础设施行业的学生
对中国西部学术环境感兴趣的学生
